enabled_events.name: PreToolUse
enabled_events.notes: Starter slot for hard safety gates. Add logic here to guard .github/workflows/*, SKILL.md frontmatter, or other sensitive paths before Claude edits them. Sync because gates must block.

enabled_events.name: PostToolUse
enabled_events.notes: Starter slot for auto-validation. Add logic here to run python3 skills/<name>/scripts/validate.py on changed SKILL.md files, or to re-chmod shell scripts under skills/*/scripts/. Async so Claude keeps moving while validation runs in the background.

enabled_events.name: Notification
enabled_events.notes: macOS desktop notifications. Add an osascript command here when ready. Async because the value is the side effect, not gating.

enabled_events.name: Stop
enabled_events.notes: End-of-turn validation gate. Runs scripts/validate-all-skills.sh, which is the shared source of truth between CI and this hook. Sync because we want the turn to fail loudly if CI would fail. Fast-paths: skips silently when the working tree is clean and nothing is ahead of upstream. Honors stop_hook_active to avoid loops.
